## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`xcodebuild test`)
- [ ] No new warnings in `xcodebuild build`
- [ ] New code is covered by tests (where applicable)
- [ ] Public APIs are documented with `///` doc comments
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots / before-after
- [ ] No new third-party dependencies
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)
